idempotence.requirement: Multiple agents working simultaneously will NOT conflict
idempotence.mechanism: Deterministic lane/batch assignments with atomic claims
idempotence.safety_guarantee: Safe to retry: if agent crashes, another can claim same batch and resume

verifiable_closure.requirement: Issues closed only after PR is merged to main
verifiable_closure.mechanism: Agents must post evidence (merged PR link) in closure comments
verifiable_closure.validation: GitHub API confirmation of merge status before closing issue

api_stability.requirement: No breaking changes to CLI or REST API
api_stability.validation: Peer review required before PR merge

safe_shutdown.blocker_protocol: Post issue comment with @maintainer tag requesting clarification
safe_shutdown.action: Move to next issue in batch; return after maintainer response

autonomous_workflow.phase_1_analysis: Read GitHub issue, extract requirements, analyze dependencies
autonomous_workflow.phase_2_planning: Design solution, check architecture alignment, plan tests
autonomous_workflow.phase_3_branching: Create feature branch per naming convention
autonomous_workflow.phase_6_pr_creation: Submit PR with linked issue, acceptance criteria, test results
autonomous_workflow.phase_8_closure: Merge PR, close issue, post completion evidence

execution_constraints.batch_claim_atomicity: Only one agent may claim a batch at a time
execution_constraints.issue_isolation: Each issue in a batch is independent; safe to parallelize within batch
execution_constraints.cross_lane_coordination: No coordination needed; lanes are fully isolated
execution_constraints.github_api_rate_limit: 5000 requests/hour per PAT; should be sufficient for 4 agents

failure_recovery.agent_crash: Progress saved atomically; next agent claims same batch from progress file
failure_recovery.network_outage: All local work preserved; GitHub sync resumes when connectivity restored
failure_recovery.rate_limit: Exponential backoff on rate limit; check progress file for retry schedule

final_validation.success_criteria: All 294 issues have merged PRs and are closed on GitHub
final_validation.post_completion: Audit trail in .github/agent_execution_progress.json with all issue closures
